gallery.body: Pura Max 2 is shown through the moments that matter most: entry comfort, quiet operation, odor control, app visibility, and litter compatibility.
gallery.title: A closer look at the daily routine.

productDescriptions.puramax-2: Balanced enclosed self-cleaning litter care with a 200 mm low entry, 2.4GHz Wi-Fi, app visibility, 35 dB operation, and 11 safety sensors.
productDescriptions.purobot-max-pro-2: Camera-assisted litter care for richer multi-cat identity and event visibility, with a larger 8L waste bin and dual-band Wi-Fi.
productDescriptions.purobot-crystal-duo: Open-top format with the lowest entry in this comparison and a PETKIT proprietary crystal tray workflow.
productDescriptions.yumshare-solo: Smart feeding support with a 3L dry-food container, scheduled meals, 1080p camera check-ins, night vision, and two-way audio.
productDescriptions.eversweet-max-2: Cordless filtered hydration support with 3L capacity, a 5000 mAh battery, 26 dB operation, motion sensing, and app monitoring.

sections.ecosystemBody: Pair self-cleaning litter care with smart feeding and fresh water in one connected PETKIT routine.
sections.ecosystemHeading: Complete the Smart Cat Care ecosystem
sections.litterBoxBody: Three PETKIT litter boxes in one category. Pick the size, format, and smart features that fit your home.

puramax-2.question: Can kittens use Pura Max 2?
puramax-2.answer: It is not recommended for cats under 1.5 kg. If a household has both kittens and adult cats, use the kitten-protection guidance in the official instructions.

puramax-2.question: Where should Pura Max 2 be placed?
puramax-2.answer: Place it on a hard, flat, stable surface. Avoid soft carpet and avoid blocking the entry path.

puramax-2.question: What happens if Wi-Fi disconnects?
puramax-2.answer: Preset settings can continue, but app data will not update until the device reconnects.

puramax-2.question: Which litter works with it?
puramax-2.answer: Use most clumping litter. Avoid crystal litter and particles longer than 12 mm, and check official guidance before trying a new litter type.

puramax-2.question: How often should the waste bin be emptied?
puramax-2.answer: PETKIT lab data states up to about 15 days for a one-cat household, but actual timing depends on the number of cats, usage frequency, temperature, and humidity.

puramax-2.question: Does it diagnose health issues?
puramax-2.answer: No. App and routine data are for daily care reference only. Pura Max 2 is not a medical or veterinary diagnostic device and does not replace advice from a veterinarian.

purobot-max-pro-2.question: Who is Purobot Max Pro 2 best for?
purobot-max-pro-2.answer: It is best for multi-cat households that want camera-assisted routine visibility, identity context, a larger 8L waste bin, and dual-band Wi-Fi.

purobot-max-pro-2.question: Which specs matter most before choosing?
purobot-max-pro-2.answer: Compare the 8L waste bin, 12 sensors, 2.4/5GHz Wi-Fi, AI camera visibility, and the fact that image data is not medical diagnosis.

purobot-max-pro-2.question: Are availability, warranty, and pricing confirmed here?

purobot-crystal-duo.question: Who is Purobot Crystal Duo best for?
purobot-crystal-duo.answer: It is best for households that prioritize low-entry access, an open-top format, and the proprietary PETKIT Crystal Litter tray workflow.

purobot-crystal-duo.question: Which specs matter most before choosing?
purobot-crystal-duo.answer: Review the 180 mm entry, 70L interior, 40 dB operation, 2.4/5GHz Wi-Fi, and PETKIT Crystal Litter tray constraint.

purobot-crystal-duo.question: Are availability, warranty, and pricing confirmed here?
purobot-crystal-duo.answer: Prices are reference pricing for this product experience. Availability, warranty, and final checkout terms can vary by market and purchase channel.

yumshare-solo.question: Who is YumShare Solo best for?
yumshare-solo.answer: It is best as the feeding add-on for scheduled dry-food meals, portion planning, and remote camera check-ins.

yumshare-solo.question: Which specs matter most before choosing?
yumshare-solo.answer: Review the 3L capacity, meal schedule, portion range, 1080p camera, two-way audio, and dry-food size limit.

yumshare-solo.question: Are availability, warranty, and pricing confirmed here?

eversweet-max-2.question: Who is Eversweet Max 2 best for?
eversweet-max-2.answer: It is best as the cordless hydration add-on for households that want filtered water support and app-connected refill visibility.

eversweet-max-2.question: Which specs matter most before choosing?
eversweet-max-2.answer: Review the 3L capacity, 5000 mAh battery, cordless runtime, 26 dB operation, motion sensing, and app control.

puramax-2.title: Calm by design
puramax-2.body: A 35 dB cycle helps the routine stay quiet during mornings, evenings, and compact-home use.

puramax-2.title: Considered safety
puramax-2.body: Eleven sensors help watch weight, motion, and approach before the cleaning routine continues.

puramax-2.title: At home in the room
puramax-2.body: The 200 mm low entry and enclosed shape support everyday comfort without adding a camera premium.

purobot-max-pro-2.title: Richer visibility
purobot-max-pro-2.body: Camera-assisted monitoring helps households that want more event context around litter-box visits.

purobot-max-pro-2.title: Multi-cat clarity
purobot-max-pro-2.body: Identity-focused features make this the upgrade path when multiple cats share the same routine.

purobot-max-pro-2.title: Spacious routine
purobot-max-pro-2.body: The large interior and larger waste bin suit homes that need more automated capacity.

purobot-crystal-duo.title: Lowest entry
purobot-crystal-duo.body: The open-top format and 180 mm entry support households that prioritize easy access.

purobot-crystal-duo.title: Tray workflow
purobot-crystal-duo.body: The crystal tray approach is suited for owners who prefer a disposable maintenance routine.

purobot-crystal-duo.title: Open profile
purobot-crystal-duo.body: The shape feels less enclosed for cats that do not prefer covered litter boxes.

yumshare-solo.title: Scheduled meals
yumshare-solo.body: Portion planning supports a steadier feeding rhythm through the day.

yumshare-solo.title: Quiet countertop fit
yumshare-solo.body: The compact body works as a companion device beside the litter-care routine.

yumshare-solo.title: Remote check-ins
yumshare-solo.body: Camera-assisted visibility helps owners follow feeding moments while away.

eversweet-max-2.title: Cordless placement
eversweet-max-2.body: Battery-powered use helps the fountain move where the cat naturally drinks.

eversweet-max-2.title: Fresh water rhythm
eversweet-max-2.body: Filtered hydration support pairs naturally with litter care and scheduled feeding.

eversweet-max-2.title: App-connected routine
eversweet-max-2.body: App visibility supports a calmer daily refill and care loop.
